evidence_quotes.quote: hundreds of games having already disappeared, because of them being online only

paragraphs.text: Dear Legislators, with the Digital Fairness Act trying to protect online consumers, I would like to humbly request, you also considered us video game enjoyers being part of this protection and being treated fairly. With hundreds of games having already disappeared, because of them being online only (this does include games people have spend there money on) and hundreds if not thousands of games being at risk of disappearing, I personally think that this is an immense issue that would need some legislation and protection for the consumers. Thank you all for reading and I hope this feedback does help shining a light on a real world problem a lot of people have to deal with on a daily basis.
